# Frostmere Primer

Frostmere is a borderland of oathbound keeps, old roads, and winter courts.

::: {.npc title="Mara Voss" tags="rival, knight"}
## Mara Voss

A disgraced knight hunting the same relic as the party.
:::

::: {.item #black-key title="Black Key" tags="relic"}
## Black Key

An iron key that opens doors remembered by the dead.
:::

::: {.rule title="Advantage"}
## Advantage

Roll twice and keep the better result.
:::

Mara carries the @item.black-key and follows the @rule.advantage procedure
when dueling on consecrated ground.
